cta.headline: Ready for New Tires?
cta.subheadline: Call us or stop by today – we'll get you rolling in no time.

servicesPage.intro: At Mike's Tires, we offer a full range of tire services to keep you safe on the road. From new and used tire sales to repairs and rotations, our team has you covered.

services.title: New Tire Sales
services.shortDescription: Premium new tires from top brands at competitive prices.
services.longDescription: We carry a wide selection of new tires from leading manufacturers like Michelin, Goodyear, Bridgestone, and more. Whether you need all-season, performance, or off-road tires, we'll help you find the perfect set for your driving needs and budget.
benefits: Latest tire technology for safety and performance

process.title: Consultation
process.description: We discuss your driving habits and recommend the best tire options.

process.title: Selection
process.description: Choose from our extensive inventory with expert guidance.

process.title: Installation
process.description: Our technicians mount, balance, and align your new tires efficiently.

faqs.question: How long does it take to install new tires?
faqs.answer: Most installations take under an hour. We strive for same-day service.

faqs.question: Do you offer tire warranties?
faqs.answer: Yes, all new tires come with manufacturer warranties. We also provide road hazard protection.

services.title: Used Tire Sales
services.shortDescription: Quality pre-owned tires at a fraction of the cost.
services.longDescription: Save money without sacrificing safety. Our used tires are thoroughly inspected for tread depth, sidewall condition, and overall integrity. We offer a wide range of sizes and brands, all at unbeatable prices.
benefits: Up to 50% less than new tires

process.title: Inspection
process.description: We check each tire for wear, damage, and age.

process.title: Matching
process.description: We find the best match for your vehicle and budget.

process.title: Installation
process.description: Professional mounting and balancing for a smooth ride.

faqs.question: How long do used tires last?
faqs.answer: It depends on tread depth and driving conditions. We grade each tire so you know what to expect.

faqs.question: Can I return a used tire if it doesn't fit?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer exchanges within 30 days for size or fit issues.

services.title: Tire Repair & Rotation
services.shortDescription: Extend the life of your tires with professional care.
services.longDescription: Regular tire maintenance is key to safety and longevity. Our team provides expert tire repairs for punctures, leaks, and damage, as well as tire rotations to ensure even wear. We'll keep your tires performing at their best.
benefits: Extends tire life by thousands of miles

process.title: Diagnosis
process.description: We inspect the tire to identify the issue.

process.title: Repair
process.description: We patch or plug the tire using industry-standard methods.

process.title: Rotation
process.description: We rotate your tires to promote even wear.

faqs.question: Can all punctures be repaired?
faqs.answer: Most punctures in the tread area can be repaired. Sidewall damage usually requires replacement.

faqs.question: How often should I rotate my tires?
faqs.answer: Every 5,000 to 7,000 miles, or as recommended by your vehicle manufacturer.

services.title: Wheel Alignment & Balancing
services.shortDescription: Ensure a smooth, safe ride with proper alignment.
services.longDescription: Misaligned wheels can cause uneven tire wear, poor handling, and reduced fuel economy. Our precision alignment and balancing services correct your vehicle's suspension angles and balance your tires for a smooth, vibration-free ride.

process.title: Inspection
process.description: We check your current alignment and balance.

process.title: Adjustment
process.description: We adjust camber, caster, and toe to manufacturer specs.

process.title: Test Drive
process.description: We verify the alignment and ensure a smooth ride.

faqs.question: How do I know if I need an alignment?
faqs.answer: Signs include uneven tire wear, pulling to one side, or a crooked steering wheel.

faqs.question: How long does alignment take?
faqs.answer: Typically 30-60 minutes depending on the vehicle.

about.headline: Your Dallas Tire Experts Since 1995
about.mission: To provide safe, affordable tires and exceptional service to every customer who walks through our doors.
story: Mike's Tires was founded in 1995 with a simple mission: offer quality tires at fair prices without the high-pressure sales tactics. Over the years, we've grown from a small shop into a trusted destination for drivers across Dallas. Our commitment to honesty and hard work has earned us a loyal customer base.

Today, we continue that tradition. Every tire we sell is inspected, every repair is done right, and every customer is treated like family. We're proud to serve the Dallas community and look forward to helping you for years to come.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We're honest about pricing and recommendations – no upsells, no gimmicks.

coreValues.title: Quality
coreValues.description: Every tire and service meets our high standards for safety and performance.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: We support our local neighbors and give back to the Dallas area.

coreValues.title: Reliability
coreValues.description: We show up on time and get the job done right the first time.

contact.headline: Get in Touch
contact.subheadline: Stop by or give us a call – we're here to help with all your tire needs.
